opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The complexity often isn’t *just* scheduling; it's about handling transient failures and ensuring idempotency across providers. You'll quickly find that simple retry logic is insufficient when dealing with unpredictable latency and rate limits – a robust system needs to understand the *why* behind the failure, not just blindly retry. Think about incorporating causal inference to dynamically adjust scheduling based on observed provider behavior.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM requests across providers and building agent orchestration layers directly touches on the challenges of scheduling tasks and managing dependencies in complex systems.
